subject: Create Endpoint For Get Cm Handles By Name
commit_message:
Create Endpoint For Get Cm Handles By Name

Create endpoint and implement logic for
get cm handle details by cm handle name

Issue-ID: CPS-817
Change-Id: I83bd2da9219d13fac715a08b19108028ca6f6751
Signed-off-by: DylanB95EST <dylan.byrne@est.tech>

Patch Set 15:

(33 comments)

big commit! I see you probably had tricky rebase...

for fist review I focussed on naming consistency

there is a legacy issue re cm handle "name" v. "id" I think we should clarify and decide as team. No need to retrofit all but at least what is being modified in this commit should be consitent with what we choose...

Patch Set 15:

> Patch Set 15:
> 
> (33 comments)
> 
> big commit! I see you probably had tricky rebase...
> 
> for fist review I focussed on naming consistency
> 
> there is a legacy issue re cm handle "name" v. "id" I think we should clarify and decide as team. No need to retrofit all but at least what is being modified in this commit should be consitent with what we choose...

looking at yang model and current cm handle class fields I suggest 'id' is the preffered term to use
